scripts.build: DIRECT_URL=${DIRECT_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} prisma db push --skip-generate && next build
scripts.db:setup: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && ts-node --compiler-options {"module":"CommonJS"} prisma/seed.ts
scripts.db:setup:fresh: prisma migrate reset --force && prisma migrate deploy && ts-node --compiler-options {"module":"CommonJS"} prisma/seed.ts
scripts.postinstall: DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://localhost/placeholder} DIRECT_URL=${DIRECT_URL:-postgresql://localhost/placeholder} prisma generate || echo 'Prisma generate skipped — run: npm run db:generate'
scripts.data:inspect: python3 -c "import json,pathlib; d=json.loads(pathlib.Path('scripts/data/00_summary.json').read_text()); [print(f'{k}: {v}') for k,v in d.items()]"
scripts.data:full: npm run data:pipeline && npx prisma db push && npm run db:seed
